message:
fix(text,demo): update test snapshots and simplify text wrap implementation

- Update 31 TUI snapshot files to reflect rendering changes from recent
  widget and accessibility improvements
- Simplify wrap.rs text wrapping logic

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
